class.name: B4R::B4RNimBLEScanner
class.comment: @class B4RNimBLEScanner @brief Lightweight BLE scanner wrapper for B4R.
class.event: NewData (Mac() As Byte, Buffer() As Byte)

method.name: Initialize
method.comment: @brief Initializes the BLE module and prepares target parameters. @param NewData - Callback when new data is received.

method.name: Start
SetCompanyFilter
method.comment: Set filter for company id. @param CompanyID - Company ID as 2 bytes, i.e. 0xEC88

method.name: SetMacFilter
method.comment: Set filter for target MAC. @param TargetMAC - Array byte length 6, i.e. 0xa4,0xc1,0x38,0x4c,0x30,0x22

method.name: SetDebug
method.comment: Set debug flag. @param Enabled - Enable debug logging via Serial
